role_title: Associate Content Strategist / Associate Content Manager

bullet_changes.original_text: Screened 150+ applicants via phone; scheduled 60 hiring manager interviews; maintained ATS records (Bullhorn) with 98% data accuracy
bullet_changes.revised_text: Maintained accurate records with 98% data accuracy in Bullhorn, ensuring seamless hiring processes for 150+ applicants and 60 hiring manager interviews.

bullet_changes.original_text: Drafted 8 job postings optimized for Indeed and LinkedIn; average job received 40% more qualified applicants vs. prior templates
bullet_changes.revised_text: Drafted 8 job postings optimized for Indeed and LinkedIn, resulting in a 40% increase in qualified applicants, demonstrating effective content strategy and writing skills.

bullet_changes.original_text: Sourced candidates for 12 open roles across light industrial, administrative, and healthcare support; filled 9 positions within target time-to-fill
bullet_changes.revised_text: Sourced candidates for 12 open roles across various industries, filling 9 positions within target time-to-fill, utilizing research and recruitment skills.

bullet_changes.original_text: Managed well-being and community programming for 45-resident floor; responded to 30+ student concerns and conduct incidents over 2 years
bullet_changes.revised_text: Responded to 30+ student concerns and conduct incidents over 2 years, while managing well-being and community programming for a 45-resident floor, showcasing strong community management skills.

bullet_changes.original_text: Planned and executed 12 community events per year with average 22-person attendance
bullet_changes.revised_text: Planned and executed 12 community events per year with an average 22-person attendance, applying event planning and content creation skills to engage the community.

bullet_changes.original_text: Trained in conflict mediation and crisis de-escalation; co-facilitated 3 bias incident response discussions
bullet_changes.revised_text: Co-facilitated 3 bias incident response discussions after training in conflict mediation and crisis de-escalation, demonstrating ability to navigate complex community issues.

bullet_changes.original_text: Conducted meta-analysis of 30 peer-reviewed studies on structured interview validity and demographic score gaps
bullet_changes.revised_text: Conducted a meta-analysis of 30 peer-reviewed studies on structured interview validity and demographic score gaps, providing evidence of existing biases.

bullet_changes.original_text: Designed a 4-panel blind scoring rubric for a simulated hiring process; tested with 18 student evaluators; reduced inter-rater variance by 34%
bullet_changes.revised_text: Designed a 4-panel blind scoring rubric for a simulated hiring process, implemented and tested with 18 student evaluators, achieving a 34% reduction in inter-rater variance.

bullet_changes.original_text: Presented findings to faculty panel; recommended for submission to OSU Undergraduate Research Journal
bullet_changes.revised_text: Presented research findings to a faculty panel and recommended the project for submission to the OSU Undergraduate Research Journal.
